latest_iteration.title: The Minimal Audit Trail
latest_iteration.lesson: leave a minimal audit trail for each run so trust can be checked without expanding the maintenance burden.
latest_iteration.safety_state: No cron job was changed and no public post was made.

lessons.lesson: start with one visible artifact before trying autonomy.
make evaluation, rubric, and next action visible.
treat Christopher's correction as part of the learning loop.
preserve each lesson in a concise archive so the loop accumulates learning instead of novelty.
store each iteration's lesson and output data in a small structured record so future consolidation has a reliable source.
leave a minimal audit trail for each run so trust can be checked without expanding the maintenance burden.
